name: add_reminder
description: Create a reminder with supported remindctl fields and an optional location trigger.

due.description: Optional due date/time accepted by remindctl.

alarm.description: Optional alarm date/time accepted by remindctl.

repeat.description: Optional recurrence rule such as daily or every 2 weeks.

priority.description: Optional priority: none, low, medium, or high.

location.description: Optional location string for a location trigger.

leaving.description: Use leaving behavior for the location trigger when true.

radius_meters.description: Optional location trigger radius in meters.
